creator: pawel@FreeBSD.org
text:
Patch partially rejects to apply on freshly checked out repo:

Hmm...  Looks like a unified diff to me...

--------------------------
|--- a/editors/codelite/Makefile
|+++ b/editors/codelite/Makefile
--------------------------
Patching file Makefile using Plan A...
Hunk #1 succeeded at 2 with fuzz 1.
Hunk #2 succeeded at 21.
Hunk #3 succeeded at 38.
Hunk #4 succeeded at 51.
Hmm...  The next patch looks like a unified diff to me...
